title: Moderation update
body: Today’s high-severity moderation triage is complete. We permanently banned spam_wave_42 for phishing spam posted across 6 channels in a short window, and banned toxic_runner for repeated targeted harassment of newcomers. We also reviewed a high-severity report against core_maintainer and closed it as a brigaded false positive with no sanction applied. All reviewed high-severity reports from this pass have been closed.
